title: trichanthemis aurea
intro: Trichanthemis aurea, commonly known as the golden pyrethrum, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa and is a member of the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trichanthemis aurea include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers can be used to make a medicinal oil, which is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
